  "findings": [
    "Rocks are in direct contact with the pipe due to a lack of bedding sand.",
    "The installation violates IPC 306 and project specifications regarding proper pipe support and backfilling."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop backfilling operations immediately.",
    "Carefully excavate and expose the affected pipe section to inspect for damage.",
    "Remove all rocks and non-compliant backfill material from the trench.",
    "Install the specified bedding sand layer before reinstalling or backfilling the pipe."
  ],
  "rationale": "Placing rocks directly against the pipe without a protective bedding sand layer violates IPC Section 306 (which requires trenches to be backfilled with clean sand or fine gravel free of rocks) and standard project specifications. This creates point loads that can puncture or deform the pipe under load, leading to structural failure.",

    "IPC 306",
    "Project Specifications"
  ]
